release_notes: 修復 Nunchaku add-on 安裝後 ComfyUI 看不到節點的問題
changes: Nunchaku v1.2.1 add-on 現在會同時安裝預編 CUDA wheel 和 ComfyUI-nunchaku 節點倉庫(v1.2.1),之前只裝了 runtime library 導致 ComfyUI 看不到節點
add-on 系統的 custom_node 類型現在允許同時指定 wheels_by_pack / pip_spec,安裝時會先裝 wheel 再 clone 節點倉庫(某些 ComfyUI 外掛需要 runtime 就緒才能被節點 __init__.py import)
custom_node 類型 add-on 的解除安裝現在會同時移除配對的 pip 套件(若有設定 pip_project_name)

en: Nunchaku v1.2.1 add-on now installs both the prebuilt CUDA wheel and the ComfyUI-nunchaku node repo (at v1.2.1). Previously only the runtime library was installed, so ComfyUI had no Nunchaku nodes to show

The add-on system's custom_node kind now allows wheels_by_pack / pip_spec alongside source_repo — the wheel is installed BEFORE the node repo is cloned, so plugins whose __init__.py imports the runtime work correctly
Uninstalling a custom_node add-on now also removes the paired pip package when pip_project_name is set
zh-TW: Nunchaku v1.2.1 add-on 現在會同時安裝預編 CUDA wheel 和 ComfyUI-nunchaku 節點倉庫(v1.2.1),之前只裝了 runtime library 導致 ComfyUI 看不到節點
add-on 系統的 custom_node 類型現在允許同時指定 wheels_by_pack / pip_spec,安裝時會先裝 wheel 再 clone 節點倉庫(某些 ComfyUI 外掛需要 runtime 就緒才能被節點 __init__.py import)
custom_node 類型 add-on 的解除安裝現在會同時移除配對的 pip 套件(若有設定 pip_project_name)
